race.description: Flanagan Construction & Concreting Super Mdn Hcp
race.comment: BUSY BEE (8) good type who made a promising debut with a fast finishing second over 1000m at Taree. Ready for the extra trip and expected to go one better here. ROCKBARTON MARSHAL (3) drifted back early from the sticky gate on debut before warming up late out wide with a solid third over 1000m at Taree. Improver who shapes as the main danger from the inside gate. LONGCHAMP LAD (6) deep into the prep and struggling to draw a decent gate. Snagged back early and savaged the line with a game third over 1250m at Taree. Cherry-ripe now and will be hitting the line strongly. JIGADEE (13) kept fresh for this. Went forward from the wide barrier and failed to go on with it when a tiring fifth over 1208m at this track. Back in weight and gets a better set-up for this with the key jockey change. GALLANT RUSH (11) improver third-up who can sneak into the minor placings.
